data.reasoning: Both models skipped PKGBUILD due to erroneous binary file classification. No executable components were audited.
coverage_issues: No review of .install scripts or build hooks
Source code handling network/filesystem operations unchecked
false_negatives: Potential risks in PKGBUILD (e.g., malicious commands)
learnings: Improve file-type detection: Never skip PKGBUILD as binary
Prioritize core build artifacts: PKGBUILD > .install > build-relevant source
Add file-type verification fallback (e.g., MIME check)
Implement error recovery: Retry misclassified text files
